flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 42% at East Central University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.2k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at East Central University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Central University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at East Central University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (19.7% → 22.6%).
